examples: A schoolgirl rushed into a burning apartment to save a man's life.
She had undergone an amazing metamorphosis from awkward schoolgirl to beautiful woman.
That schoolgirl was sitting with her feet stretched far out into the aisle, and was busily chewing gum, when the teacher espied her.
The family of murdered schoolgirl Milly Dowler, whose phone was allegedly hacked, have not issued proceedings.
Gillian Etherton, QC, prosecuting, said Ms Davies was "bullying and controlling" towards the schoolgirl.
